[Verse]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][Riff 1]
e|------------------|

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
   I don't wanna see you   ever sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
   And everything I've got   you can have[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
   When it's all too much[/tab]

   You need some human touch[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
   Did you call on every    saint you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
   But still you feel like you're   on your own[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
   Can you see through your tears[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
   I will always be here[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
   And you're not out there baby   all alone..[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/B[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am/G[/ch]
   Hold on, 'till you feel a little stronger[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am/G[/ch]
   Hold on, everything's gonna be alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
   Just hold on to me tonight.[/tab]
